messages.content: I have a login form in c# connected to sql server table CustomerTbl I want a query to be able to set int i= (last CustomerID) +1
How would it know to select CustomerID column?

The `IDENT_CURRENT` function retrieves the last identity value generated for the specified table, regardless of which column has been set with the identity property. Therefore, it doesn't matter which column in the `CustomerTbl` table is set as the identity column, as long as the table has an identity column. 

In other words, the `IDENT_CURRENT` function doesn't select any specific column, it just returns the last generated identity value for the table. You can use this value to set the value of `i` to the next available CustomerID, regardless of which column has been set as the identity column in the `CustomerTbl` table.
How do I make a variable available in one form to all forms
its giving me this error System.InvalidCastException: 'Object cannot be cast from DBNull to other types.'
but there are entires in the table
what query can I use in sql to give me last entry

To retrieve the last entry in the `CustomerTbl` table based on the `CustomerID` column, you can use the `ORDER BY` clause with the `DESC` keyword to sort the result set in descending order and then use the `TOP` keyword to return only the first row.

Here's the SQL query you can use:

```
SELECT TOP 1 * FROM CustomerTbl ORDER BY CustomerID DESC
```

This query retrieves all columns for the last inserted row in the `CustomerTbl` table. If you only need to retrieve the value of the `CustomerID` column, you can modify the query to select only that column:

```
SELECT TOP 1 CustomerID FROM CustomerTbl ORDER BY CustomerID DESC
```

This query retrieves the value of `CustomerID` for the last inserted row in the `CustomerTbl` table.
SELECT TOP 1 * FROM CustomerTbl ORDER BY CustomerID DESC , how do I select the ID only?

To select only the `CustomerID` column from the last row in the `CustomerTbl` table, you can modify the query as follows:

```
SELECT TOP 1 CustomerID FROM CustomerTbl ORDER BY CustomerID DESC
```

This will return only the `CustomerID` value for the last row inserted into the `CustomerTbl` table.
instead of rdr.Getint32 what do I use to get a string?
How to I give public static string CustomerName a value that is available in a variable

You can assign a value to the `CustomerName` property of the `GlobalVariables` class as follows:

```
GlobalVariables.CustomerName = myVariable;
```

Here, `myVariable` is the name of the variable that you want to assign to the `CustomerName` property. 

For example, if you want to assign the value of `customerName` variable to the `CustomerName` property, you can do this:

```
string customerName = "John";
GlobalVariables.CustomerName = customerName;
```

This will set the value of the `CustomerName` property to `"John"`. Once you have set the value of the `CustomerName` property, you can access it from anywhere in your application using `GlobalVariables.CustomerName`.
when I do for example String CName=GlobalVariables.CustomerName in another form it fives the following error does not exist in current context
